# services

## Concepts

* [Api Gateway](api-gateway.md) - Owns the api gateway concern.
* [Audit Log](audit-log.md) - Owns the audit log concern.
* [Auth Service](auth-service.md) - Owns the auth service concern.
* [Billing Engine](billing-engine.md) - Owns the billing engine concern.
* [Core Platform](core-platform.md) - Shared kernel every product surface builds on.
* [Email Composer](email-composer.md) - Owns the email composer concern.
* [Export Worker](export-worker.md) - Owns the export worker concern.
* [Feature Flags](feature-flags.md) - Owns the feature flags concern.
* [Import Pipeline](import-pipeline.md) - Owns the import pipeline concern.
* [Metrics Collector](metrics-collector.md) - Owns the metrics collector concern.
* [Mobile Backend](mobile-backend.md) - Owns the mobile backend concern.
* [Notification Relay](notification-relay.md) - Owns the notification relay concern.
* [Queue Broker](queue-broker.md) - Owns the queue broker concern.
* [Rate Limiter](rate-limiter.md) - Owns the rate limiter concern.
* [Search Indexer](search-indexer.md) - Owns the search indexer concern.
* [Session Store](session-store.md) - Owns the session store concern.
* [Stream Processor](stream-processor.md) - Owns the stream processor concern.
* [User Service](user-service.md) - Owns the user service concern.
* [Web Frontend](web-frontend.md) - Owns the web frontend concern.
* [Webhook Dispatcher](webhook-dispatcher.md) - Owns the webhook dispatcher concern.
